title: Menstrual Cup, Tampons & Period Panties Explained | Pros, Cons & Safety Tips by Gynaecologist
description: Confused between menstrual cups, tampons, and period panties? In this interview, Dr. Anitha, Gynaecologist at Kauvery Hospital, breaks down everything you need to know to choose what’s right for you. She explains how to pick the right menstrual cup size, how often to change cups and tampons, how to clean and store them safely, plus the pros and cons of each option. Dr. Anitha also clears up myths around Toxic Shock Syndrome linked to tampon use and shares practical tips for first-time users.

Vitiligo is not contagious: Dermatologist urges people to look beyond the skin this World Vitiligo Day
description: Vitiligo is more than just skin deep, often causing significant psychological distress and social stigma.  This autoimmune condition, where pigment-producing cells are attacked, isn't contagious and has no single cause. While a permanent cure remains elusive, early and personalized dermatological treatments offer hope. World Vitiligo Day urges us to focus on empathy, inclusion, and proper care, rather than just the visible appearance of the condition.

Police confirmed Vaishak knew the actress and had visited her residence on Wednesday night. Thapanda was reportedly out of town. Authorities are investigating the unnatural death, examining CCTV footage, and awaiting the post-mortem report to ascertain the cause.

Elon Musk loses trillionaire status to "Accenture-triggered wipeout" in the US market
description: Elon Musk lost his trillionaire status barely two weeks after earning it, as a tech sell-off sparked by Accenture's weak guidance wiped over $360 billion from his fortune. SpaceX shares crashed more than 30% from their June peak, while Tesla slid 5.8%, dropping Musk's net worth to $957 billion. With both stocks holding up nearly his entire wealth, the rout hit harder than any rival. A 6% SpaceX rebound could restore his trillionaire title.

This year marks a significant shift with the introduction of a new two-exam system, offering students a second chance to improve their performance. Previous supplementary exam data reveals a notable increase in pass percentages from 2024 to 2025, indicating evolving student outcomes.

title: Ex-AAP candidate found dead in flat; family alleges murder by live-in partner
description: A 23-year-old woman's death in Rajkot has ignited accusations of murder from her family, who point to her live-in partner, Aslam Sama. Nandani Bosmiya was found hanging in her apartment, with relatives alleging frequent disputes and past assaults by Sama, who is reportedly married. The family questions the scene's circumstances, citing an unlatched main door and an open balcony. Police are investigating all angles, awaiting forensic postmortem results.

title: Strait of Hormuz reopens: Middle East oil exports to climb to 4-month high
description: The Strait of Hormuz is reopening, paving the way for Middle Eastern fuel oil exports to reach a four-month high in June. Iraq and Saudi Arabia are leading this surge, with Iraq notably diversifying routes through Syria. While shipments are increasing, they remain below pre-war levels, and cautious optimism prevails due to ongoing negotiation uncertainties. This development follows an interim US-Iran agreement.

The pickup truck broke down, and the owner was forced to pay for repairs despite it being under warranty. The commission found the companies liable for deficiency in service, rejecting their claims of driver abuse and delayed service. The owner also gets compensation for mental agony and litigation costs.

The conflict's financial toll includes substantial spending on munitions, equipment losses, and base damage, with broader economic impacts also noted.

description: National Council of Educational Research and Training NCERT has cautioned against circulation of pirated and unauthorised textbooks in print and digital formats across online platforms in India. A fake Class IX Social Science textbook titled Understanding Society India Beyond is being shared on social media, websites and groups. NCERT has advised stakeholders to rely only on official sources including its website ePathshala and authorised vendors, while announcing legal action under Copyright Act 1957 against offenders.

Why every homeowner needs a Khata certificate: process, documents & benefits explained
description: Securing a Khata certificate is crucial for all property owners in Karnataka, validating ownership and enabling essential services. This municipal document is mandatory for property tax payments, bank loans, utility connections, and building permits. The process involves submitting required documents and a physical property verification. Obtaining a Khata ensures your property's legal standing and smooth transactions within the civic system.

title: Neymar matches Pelé with one of Brazil's rarest World Cup feat
description: Neymar made his long-awaited World Cup return in Brazil’s 3-0 win over Scotland, becoming only the fourth Brazilian to appear at four World Cups and just the second after Pelé to wear Brazil’s iconic No. 10 shirt across four editions. The 34-year-old impressed in a brief cameo as Brazil finished top of Group C and advanced unbeaten to the Round of 32.

title: Avengers Endgame set for re-release ahead of Doomsday with new footage
Embracing grey hair may reveal your mindset, self-confidence, and emotional maturity
description: Discovering your first grey hair often sparks a deeper psychological journey.  Research reveals women embracing their natural grey are pushing back against societal stigma, prioritizing authenticity over appearing youthful. This choice signifies a quiet act of self-acceptance and emotional maturity, demonstrating a shift in self-worth away from external validation and towards inner peace.  It's a powerful statement of embracing who you are.

description: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the youngest ever selected for India's men's team, is poised for a potential international debut against Ireland. His rapid rise, marked by a record-breaking List A fifty and a stellar IPL 2026 season, has generated immense excitement. With his parents present in Belfast, fans eagerly await his first cap, a dream fulfilled for the 15-year-old prodigy.

Watch: Venezuela, Japan & California shaken by powerful quakes within hours
description: A day of powerful seismic activity saw major earthquakes strike Venezuela, Japan, and California. Venezuela experienced the most devastating impact with twin quakes causing fatalities and building collapses. Japan's northeast coast was hit by a strong tremor, while northern California also registered a significant quake. Experts confirm these events are unrelated, occurring on separate fault lines.

Delhi horror: After 10-year-old's rape, murder, accused cleaned cab, took ride
description: A habitual offender, Basu Singh, allegedly abducted, raped, and murdered a 10-year-old girl before attempting to meticulously erase evidence.  He changed clothes and scrubbed his cab, then resumed his usual work.  Singh, with a history of five cases including molestation and attempted murder, claimed family land disputes were behind the charges. Police apprehended him after technical surveillance.

title: High court cites Mahatma Gandhi’s vision of prohibition, cancels liquor bar licence
Venezuela earthquake: 32 killed, over 700 injured; state of emergency declared
description: In the wake of devastating twin earthquakes, Venezuela has declared a national state of emergency. Infrastructure has been severely impacted, with many buildings reduced to rubble and fears of casualties potentially soaring between 10,000 and 100,000, according to the USGS. Rescue operations have been hindered, especially in the capital Caracas and at Maiquetia International Airport, where damage is extensive.

description: The Los Angeles Lakers would reportedly pursue a sign-and-trade sending LeBron James to the Cleveland Cavaliers for center Jarrett Allen, ESPN's Brian Windhorst said June 24, 2026 on ESPN Cleveland radio. James, an unrestricted free agent carrying a roughly $59.5 million cap hold, made $52.6 million last season. The proposal has gained traction because Allen would address the Lakers' long-standing need at center while complementing Luka Doncic and newly re-signed Austin Reaves.

description: A shocking act of violence unfolded on a Mumbai local train as a clothing store employee allegedly stabbed a co-passenger to death following an argument over a train door. The dispute, reportedly sparked by rain splashing passengers, escalated when the accused, feeling humiliated, repeatedly attacked the victim. Authorities apprehended the suspect in Panvel while he was attempting to flee.

description: A tourist's holiday in Goa turned tragic after he ignored safety warnings and his friend's pleas, losing his life at Baga beach. Ashpaq Masali, 34, reportedly consumed alcohol before attempting a daredevil stunt on slippery rocks, only to be swept away by a powerful wave. Despite rescue efforts, his body was later recovered. Authorities had previously advised against venturing near the sea during the monsoon due to hazardous conditions.

The retired UFC star said adjusting to life after fighting has been difficult and acknowledged that alcohol is not helping. In an emotional Instagram message, Poirier said he wants to protect his family and take the right steps to improve his life moving forward.

description: SoftBank's Masayoshi Son, 68, plans to lead the tech giant for another decade, focusing intensely on artificial intelligence and robotics. Dismissing 'AI bubble' fears as 'blasphemy,' Son believes AI's potential is just unfolding. He aims to achieve 'artificial superintelligence' and is backing this vision with significant investments in companies like Arm and OpenAI, alongside robotics acquisitions.

title: Summer travel hack: How to use your credit card to save big
description: When selecting a travel credit card, you should focus on the overall value proposition instead of the headline benefits. Ideally, core benefits on travel-centric cards should be evaluated.

title: Tech millionaire Bryan Johnson says, ‘I don’t plan on dying, like actually I won’t die
description: Tech entrepreneur Bryan Johnson, 47, claims he's achieved an 18-year-old biological age and doesn't plan to die, citing advancements in biotechnology.  He advocates for radical life extension through rigorous health optimization, including strict diets and medical monitoring.  Johnson recently shared 41 accessible health hacks, emphasizing sleep, exercise, whole foods, and avoiding risky behaviors as crucial for longevity, even with his multi-million dollar anti-aging regimen.
